column1: Sprint 2: Personalization Core: Personas + Workout Recommendation Engine
Sprint Goal: A user is classified into personas and receives 3-4 personalized workout options with one recommended.

column5: As a user, I want the app to understand what kind of exerciser I am so that my recommendations feel relevant to my actual situation.
column6: Depends on Profile Data Collection (US-02.1.1); behavioral personas depend on Workout Session completion data (EPIC-07) existing.
column9: Personalization Core: Personas + Workout Recommendation Engine

column4: Expose persona data to personalization features
column5: As a product team, I want persona tags to be available to the Workout Recommendation Engine and AI Avatar so that personalization is consistent across the app.
column9: Personalization Core: Personas + Workout Recommendation Engine

column5: As a user, I want to see a few different workout options so that I feel I have a choice rather than being forced into a single plan.
column6: Depends on Health Metrics (EPIC-03) and Persona Classification (US-04.1.1) being available as inputs.
column9: Personalization Core: Personas + Workout Recommendation Engine

column5: As a user, I want one workout option to be clearly recommended so that I don't have to think hard if I just want to get started quickly.
column9: Personalization Core: Personas + Workout Recommendation Engine

column4: Receive recommendations tailored to my goal, level, and persona
column5: As a user, I want my workout recommendations to reflect my goal, fitness level, persona, and stated inputs so that the plans actually fit my situation.
column6: Depends on Multi-Plan Generation (US-05.1.1) and Persona-Driven Personalization Hooks (US-04.2.1).
column9: Personalization Core: Personas + Workout Recommendation Engine

column5: As a user, I want to answer onboarding questions using my voice so that I can complete setup hands-free or more naturally.
column6: Depends on Profile Data Collection (US-02.1.1) UI being in place; depends on AI Avatar voice infrastructure (EPIC-06) if STT service is shared.
column9: Personalization Core: Personas + Workout Recommendation Engine
